BloodLust.name: PASSIVE_FRENZY_NAME
BloodLust.desc_resolved: When you down a unit, gain +2 [img:str].

2.desc_resolved: When you down a unit, gain +2 [img:str] and +2 [img:spd].

Avenger.name: PASSIVE_AVENGER_NAME
Avenger.desc_resolved: When an allied cat is downed, gain All Stats Up 2 and heal 8.

2.desc_resolved: When an allied cat is downed, gain All Stats Up 2, heal 50% of your max HP, and take an extra turn.
+3 Brace.
When you take damage, gain +2 [img:spd] and +10% dodge. This caps at 50%.

KillsHeal.name: PASSIVE_FERVOR_NAME
KillsHeal.desc_resolved: When you down a unit, you heal 5 HP.

2.desc_resolved: When you down a unit, you heal 50% of your HP.

Vengeful.name: PASSIVE_VENGEFUL_NAME
Vengeful.desc_resolved: Your basic attack is always critical on enemies that have damaged you.

2.desc_resolved:
Your basic attack is always critical on enemies units that have damaged you.
Inflict Marked on units that contact or attack you.

HamsterStyle.name: PASSIVE_HAMSTERSTYLE_NAME
HamsterStyle.desc_resolved:
+1 Health Regeneration.
Start with 2 Bonus Moves.

2.desc_resolved:
+2 Health Regeneration.
Start with 2 Bonus Moves.
Your basic attack has a chance to attack multiple times.

WeaponMaster.name: PASSIVE_WEAPONMASTER_NAME
WeaponMaster.desc_resolved: Your weapon and item abilities deal +2 Damage and get +25% critical chance. A pipe is added to your inventory.

2.desc_resolved:
Your weapon and item abilities deal +3 Damage and get +50% critical chance.
If you don't have a weapon, gain a random temporary weapon at the beginning of the battle.

ShoulderCheck.name: PASSIVE_SHOULDERCHECK_NAME
ShoulderCheck.desc_resolved: If you're facing a unit after you move, automatically attack it at 33% damage.

2.desc_resolved: If you're facing a unit after you move, automatically attack the unit.
Your basic attack inflicts Bruise 2.
+2 Brace

Overpowered.name: PASSIVE_OVERPOWERED_NAME
Overpowered.desc_resolved: Excess damage you deal to units makes them explode, dealing the excess damage to units around it, except for you.

2.desc_resolved: Excess damage you deal to units makes them explode, dealing the excess damage to units within 2 tiles of it, except for you.

FightMe.name: PASSIVE_FIGHTME_NAME
FightMe.desc_resolved: You have +2 [img:str] and +1 Brace for each enemy adjacent to you.

2.desc_resolved: You have +3 [img:str] and +2 Brace for each enemy adjacent to you.

HighAsYouCanCount.name: PASSIVE_MATHQ_NAME
HighAsYouCanCount.desc_resolved: Your spells cost 3 mana to cast, but each can be cast only once per turn.

2.desc_resolved: Your spells cost 0 mana to cast, but each can be cast only once per turn.

DumbMuscle.name: PASSIVE_DUMBMUSCLE_NAME
DumbMuscle.desc_resolved:
Lose 1 [img:int] each time you take damage.
If you have 4 or less [img:int], gain +2 [img:str] and your basic attack inflicts Bruise. at 0 [img:int], gain +100% critical hit chance.

2.desc_resolved:
Lose 2 [img:int] each time you take damage.
If you have 4 or less [img:int], gain +2 [img:str] and your basic attack inflicts Bruise. At 0 [img:int], gain +100% critical hit chance. At -10 [img:int], you can use your basic move and attack an additional time each turn.

ThickSkull.name: PASSIVE_THICKSKULL_NAME
ThickSkull.desc_resolved:
All injuries you get are Concussions.
You get +3 [img:shield] for each concussion you have. This caps at 30 [img:shield].

2.desc_resolved:
All injuries you get are Concussions.
You get +3 [img:shield] and +1 [img:str] for each concussion you have. This caps at 30 [img:shield] and 10 [img:str].

MostValuableCat.name: PASSIVE_MOSTVALUABLECAT_NAME
MostValuableCat.desc_resolved:
When you or an ally downs another unit, they become the Alpha.
If you're the Alpha, take an extra turn at the end of each round.

2.desc_resolved:
You start the battle as the Alpha.
Whenever you or an ally downs another unit, they become the Alpha.
If you're the Alpha, take an extra turn at the end of each round.
+30% dodge chance.

Boned.name: PASSIVE_BONED_NAME
Boned.desc_resolved: When you kill a unit, if you don't have a weapon, gain a Bone Club.

2.desc_resolved:
When you kill a unit, if you don't have a weapon, gain a Bone Club.
Bonus Ability: Throw Weapon.

DualWield.name: PASSIVE_DUALWIELD_NAME
DualWield.desc_resolved: When you use your weapon, automatically use it again for free.

2.desc_resolved: When you use your weapon, automatically use it again for free, and then again! for free!

ReflexPunch.name: PASSIVE_PATELLARREFLEX_NAME
ReflexPunch.desc_resolved: When a unit damages you, counter-attack dealing 1 damage and inflicting Bruise.

2.desc_resolved: When a unit damages you, counter-attack with your basic attack and inflict Bruise.

HitMe.name: PASSIVE_HITME_NAME
HitMe.desc_resolved:
When you take damage from an ally, basic attack in the direction you're facing.
Damage you take from allies is reduced to 1.

2.desc_resolved:
When you take damage from an ally, basic attack in the direction you're facing.
Damage you take from allies is reduced to 1.
Whenever you take damage, gain +1 to a random stat.

Smash.name: PASSIVE_SMASH_NAME
Smash.desc_resolved:
Your weapons deals triple damage, but they always break when you use them.
Three Sticks are added to your inventory.

2.desc_resolved:
Your weapons deals triple damage, but they have a 50% chance to break when you use them.
Three more Sticks are added to your inventory.

PunchFace.name: PASSIVE_PUNCHFACE_NAME
PunchFace.desc_resolved: Your basic attacks are critical if they hit the front of a unit.

2.desc_resolved: Your physical attacks are critical if they hit the front of a unit.

Recoil.name: PASSIVE_MERCILESS_NAME
Recoil.desc_resolved: When you deal 10 or more damage in a single hit, gain +2 [img:shield] and refresh your movement action.

2.desc_resolved: When you deal 10 or more damage in a single hit, gain +2 [img:shield], All Stats Up, and refresh your movement action.
